summary: Completed testing of Templates feature (iteration 8). All 6 structured document templates (Basic, Scientific, Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry) working correctly with editing, saving to MongoDB, and Word export.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/templates returns 200
Backend: GET /api/templates returns exactly 6 templates
Backend: All 6 template types present (basic, scientific, geography, mathematics, physics, chemistry)
Backend: Templates have required fields (template_id, name, type, description, content)
Backend: Geography template has questions field in content
Backend: POST /api/templates saves template and returns 200
Backend: POST /api/templates returns saved template data
Backend: POST /api/templates saves geography questions array
Backend: Saved template persists in GET /api/templates
Backend: POST /api/templates/{id}/export returns application/msword
Backend: Export has Content-Disposition header with .doc filename
Backend: Scientific template export works
Backend: Geography export includes questions in HTML
Backend: Math template export uses monospace font
Backend: DELETE /api/templates/{id} returns 200
Backend: GET /api/templates without auth returns 401
Backend: POST /api/templates without auth returns 401
Frontend: Templates menu is active (not disabled/Coming Soon)
Frontend: Templates page renders 6 template cards
Frontend: All 6 template cards have correct icons and labels
Frontend: Premium badges shown for Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry
Frontend: Clicking template card opens editor
Frontend: Editor has Title, Subject, Category input fields
Frontend: Editor has contentEditable body area
Frontend: Geography template shows Questions inputs (3 default)
Frontend: Geography template has '+ Add Question' button
Frontend: Mathematics template uses monospace font (Courier New)
Frontend: Save button saves template via POST /api/templates
Frontend: Save button shows 'Saved!' confirmation
Frontend: Export DOCX button downloads .doc file
Frontend: Back button returns to templates list
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration8_templates.py - Created comprehensive backend tests for Templates feature
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user session. Templates saved during testing: template_basic, template_scientific, template_geography, template_mathematics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Templates feature fully implemented and tested. 6 template types: basic, scientific, geography, mathematics, physics, chemistry. Geography has extra questions[] field. Math/Physics/Chemistry use monospace font. Export generates HTML-based .doc file that MS Word can open. Templates menu in MyHub sidebar is active (no longer Coming Soon). PesaPal payments remain MOCKED.

real_integrations.GET /api/templates: Real MongoDB storage - returns 6 default templates merged with user-saved
real_integrations.POST /api/templates: Real MongoDB storage - saves/updates user template

templates_page_renders_6_cards.details: Templates page shows 6 template cards: Basic, Scientific, Geography, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry

templates_menu_active.details: Templates menu item in MyHub sidebar is active (not disabled/Coming Soon)

template_editor_opens.details: Clicking template card opens editor with title, subject, category fields

geography_questions_inputs.details: Geography template editor shows 3 Questions inputs and '+ Add Question' button

contenteditable_body.details: Template editor has contentEditable body area for rich text editing

save_template.details: Save button saves template content via POST /api/templates, shows 'Saved!' confirmation

export_docx.details: Export DOCX button downloads Word-compatible .doc file via POST /api/templates/{id}/export

backend_get_templates.details: GET /api/templates returns 6 default templates (merged with user-saved)

backend_post_templates.details: POST /api/templates saves/updates user template in MongoDB

monospace_font_math_physics_chemistry.details: Math/Physics/Chemistry templates use monospace font (Courier New) in editor and export
